---
title: "UIAO Reciprocal-Consumption Entitlement Registry Schema"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · registry.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-068](../../adr/adr-068-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/reciprocal-consumption/registry.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/reciprocal-consumption/registry.schema.json)
- **Dialect:** `http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#`
- **`$id`:** `https://uiao.gov/schemas/reciprocal-consumption/registry.schema.json`
:::

## Description

JSON Schema for the UIAO reciprocal-consumption entitlement registry. Entitlements authorize a consumer (federal agency, state, employer, or external party) to fetch a specific attribute from an authority of record under a documented legal basis. Required reading: UIAO_141 §6 (Reciprocal-Consumption Entitlements) and UIAO_142 §5 (Reciprocity provisioning). Every entitlement MUST cite a legal basis (Privacy Act SORN routine use, CMPPA matching agreement, statute, or customer consent reference) — CI rejects entitlements without one. Established by ADR-055.

## Top-Level Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `schema-version` | string | ✓ | Semantic version of this registry document schema. |
| `updated` | string |  | ISO 8601 date of the most recent registry update. |
| `entitlements` | array&lt;`$ref: #/definitions/entitlement`&gt; | ✓ | Ordered list of reciprocal-consumption entitlement entries. |

## Full Schema

```{.json filename="registry.schema.json"}
{
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "$id": "https://uiao.gov/schemas/reciprocal-consumption/registry.schema.json",
  "title": "UIAO Reciprocal-Consumption Entitlement Registry Schema",
  "description": "JSON Schema for the UIAO reciprocal-consumption entitlement registry. Entitlements authorize a consumer (federal agency, state, employer, or external party) to fetch a specific attribute from an authority of record under a documented legal basis. Required reading: UIAO_141 \u00a76 (Reciprocal-Consumption Entitlements) and UIAO_142 \u00a75 (Reciprocity provisioning). Every entitlement MUST cite a legal basis (Privacy Act SORN routine use, CMPPA matching agreement, statute, or customer consent reference) \u2014 CI rejects entitlements without one. Established by ADR-055.",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema-version",
    "entitlements"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema-version": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Semantic version of this registry document schema.",
      "pattern": "^[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$"
    },
    "updated": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date",
      "description": "ISO 8601 date of the most recent registry update."
    },
    "entitlements": {
      "type": "array",
      "description": "Ordered list of reciprocal-consumption entitlement entries.",
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/definitions/entitlement"
      }
    }
  },
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "definitions": {
    "entitlement": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "id",
        "attribute_id",
        "authority_of_record",
        "consumer_principal",
        "legal_basis",
        "scope",
        "freshness_window_hours",
        "effective_date",
        "signed_by"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Kebab-case stable identifier for the entitlement; never renamed once assigned. Format: <consumer>-<attribute>-<seq>, e.g. irs-ssa-ssn-001.",
          "pattern": "^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$"
        },
        "attribute_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Canonical attribute identifier in the form <authority>.<attribute>, e.g. ssa.ssn, irs.tin, gsa.uei, uscis.immigration-status.",
          "pattern": "^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*\\.[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$"
        },
        "authority_of_record": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Adapter ID of the authority that owns the attribute. Must resolve to an entry in adapter-registry.yaml or modernization-registry.yaml.",
          "pattern": "^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$"
        },
        "consumer_principal": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The principal entitled to consume the attribute. Free-form: an agency name (e.g., 'irs.gov'), a state DMV ('state.ca.dmv'), an employer ('employer-X'), a customer-consent reference, or a service-principal ID."
        },
        "legal_basis": {
          "type": "object",
          "description": "Required citation for the legal basis authorizing this entitlement. CI rejects entries without a documented legal basis.",
          "required": [
            "type",
            "citation"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "type": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "privacy-act-sorn-routine-use",
                "cmppa-matching-agreement",
                "statute",
                "customer-consent",
                "interagency-mou"
              ]
            },
            "citation": {
              "type": "string",
              "description": "Specific citation (SORN ID + routine-use number; CMPPA agreement ID; U.S.C. section; consent record reference; MOU document ID)."
            },
            "url": {
              "type": "string",
              "description": "Optional link to the authoritative source.",
              "format": "uri"
            }
          },
          "additionalProperties": false
        },
        "scope": {
          "type": "array",
          "description": "Attribute fields the consumer is entitled to. Examples: ['full-ssn'], ['last-four-ssn', 'name'], ['tin', 'tax-year-2024'].",
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "minItems": 1
        },
        "freshness_window_hours": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Maximum cache age in hours before the consumer must re-fetch from the authority of record. Beyond this window, cached values emit a DRIFT-SEMANTIC finding.",
          "minimum": 1
        },
        "effective_date": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date",
          "description": "ISO 8601 date the entitlement becomes valid."
        },
        "expiry_date": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date",
          "description": "ISO 8601 date the entitlement expires. Optional; absent means no fixed expiry, but an audit must occur at least annually."
        },
        "signed_by": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Signing identity of the authority of record (PIV-bound DN, service principal ID, or CIO identity)."
        },
        "notes": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Free-text notes. Not machine-consumed."
        }
      },
      "additionalProperties": false
    }
  }
}
```
